response: ANGEL WRITES LETTERS TO PEN PAL FRIENDS USING LARGE ENVELOPES FOR MOST CORRESPONDENCE WHILE SMALL ONES HOLD TWENTY REMAINING NOTES EACH BIG CONTAINER HOLDS TWO SHEETS TOTAL COUNT REACHES EIGHTY SO CALCULATE HOW MANY BIG ONES WERE REQUIRED BY SUBTRACTING TWENTY FROM EIGHTY THEN DIVIDING THIRTY BY TWO TO GET THIRTY
